log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 14 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 45/59
→ Bite: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 10 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist HP: 35/59
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 20] MISS.

══ ROUND 6 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Armored Escapist --- HP: 5/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
